property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: build/sbt-launch-1.9.9.jar set every scalafmtCheck := {} set (kernelUnityCatalog / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty set (kernelDefaults / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty spark/testOnly org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnDFWriterV1InsertIntoSuite -- -z "replaceOn with always-false"

testcase.name: replaceOn with always-false condition appends all rows

failure.message:
Results do not match for query: Timezone: sun.util.calendar.ZoneInfo[id="America/Los_Angeles",offset=-28800000,dstSavings=3600000,useDaylight=true,transitions=185,lastRule=java.util.SimpleTimeZone[id=America/Los_Angeles,offset=-28800000,dstSavings=3600000,useDaylight=true,startYear=0,startMode=3,startMonth=2,startDay=8,startDayOfWeek=1,startTime=7200000,startTimeMode=0,endMode=3,endMonth=10,endDay=1,endDayOfWeek=1,endTime=7200000,endTimeMode=0]] Timezone Env:
== Parsed Logical Plan == 'Sort ['id ASC NULLS FIRST], true +- Relation [id#994,data#995] parquet
== Analyzed Logical Plan == id: int, data: string Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true +- Relation [id#994,data#995] parquet
== Optimized Logical Plan == Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true +- Relation [id#994,data#995] parquet
== Physical Plan == AdaptiveSparkPlan isFinalPlan=true +- == Final Plan == ResultQueryStage 1 +- *(2) Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true, 0 +- AQEShuffleRead coalesced +- ShuffleQueryStage 0 +- Exchange rangepartitioning(id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST, 5), ENSURE_REQUIREMENTS, [plan_id=357] +- *(1) ColumnarToRow +- FileScan parquet [id#994,data#995] Batched: true, DataFilters: [], Format: Parquet, Location: PreparedDeltaFileIndex(1 paths)[file:/tmp/spark-803d0681-fab3-4f6e-87a5-7d8b0e467471], PartitionFilters: [], PushedFilters: [], ReadSchema: struct<id:int,data:string> +- == Initial Plan == Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true, 0 +- Exchange rangepartitioning(id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST, 5), ENSURE_REQUIREMENTS, [plan_id=288] +- FileScan parquet [id#994,data#995] Batched: true, DataFilters: [], Format: Parquet, Location: PreparedDeltaFileIndex(1 paths)[file:/tmp/spark-803d0681-fab3-4f6e-87a5-7d8b0e467471], PartitionFilters: [], PushedFilters: [], ReadSchema: struct<id:int,data:string>
== Results ==
== Results == !== Correct Answer - 4 == == Spark Answer - 2 == !struct<> struct<id:int,data:string> ![1,original1] [10,new1] ![2,original2] [20,new2] ![10,new1] ![20,new2]

testcase.failure:
org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: Results do not match for query: Timezone: sun.util.calendar.ZoneInfo[id="America/Los_Angeles",offset=-28800000,dstSavings=3600000,useDaylight=true,transitions=185,lastRule=java.util.SimpleTimeZone[id=America/Los_Angeles,offset=-28800000,dstSavings=3600000,useDaylight=true,startYear=0,startMode=3,startMonth=2,startDay=8,startDayOfWeek=1,startTime=7200000,startTimeMode=0,endMode=3,endMonth=10,endDay=1,endDayOfWeek=1,endTime=7200000,endTimeMode=0]] Timezone Env:
== Parsed Logical Plan == 'Sort ['id ASC NULLS FIRST], true +- Relation [id#994,data#995] parquet
== Analyzed Logical Plan == id: int, data: string Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true +- Relation [id#994,data#995] parquet
== Optimized Logical Plan == Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true +- Relation [id#994,data#995] parquet
== Physical Plan == AdaptiveSparkPlan isFinalPlan=true +- == Final Plan == ResultQueryStage 1 +- *(2) Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true, 0 +- AQEShuffleRead coalesced +- ShuffleQueryStage 0 +- Exchange rangepartitioning(id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST, 5), ENSURE_REQUIREMENTS, [plan_id=357] +- *(1) ColumnarToRow +- FileScan parquet [id#994,data#995] Batched: true, DataFilters: [], Format: Parquet, Location: PreparedDeltaFileIndex(1 paths)[file:/tmp/spark-803d0681-fab3-4f6e-87a5-7d8b0e467471], PartitionFilters: [], PushedFilters: [], ReadSchema: struct<id:int,data:string> +- == Initial Plan == Sort [id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST], true, 0 +- Exchange rangepartitioning(id#994 ASC NULLS FIRST, 5), ENSURE_REQUIREMENTS, [plan_id=288] +- FileScan parquet [id#994,data#995] Batched: true, DataFilters: [], Format: Parquet, Location: PreparedDeltaFileIndex(1 paths)[file:/tmp/spark-803d0681-fab3-4f6e-87a5-7d8b0e467471], PartitionFilters: [], PushedFilters: [], ReadSchema: struct<id:int,data:string>
== Results ==
== Results == !== Correct Answer - 4 == == Spark Answer - 2 == !struct<> struct<id:int,data:string> ![1,original1] [10,new1] ![2,original2] [20,new2] ![10,new1] ![20,new2]
